title: Husband Of Adelaide Woman Who Faked Son’s Cancer Diagnosis Gives Victim Impact Statement | 10 News
description: The husband of an Adelaide woman who faked their son’s cancer diagnosis as part of a scam to raise money has delivered an emotional victim impact statement to court. Ben Miller said he felt like “a pawn in a chess game”, which has changed his children's lives forever. title: Aussie Fuel Crisis, Iran Footballers Update, New Evidence Reveals Banksy's Identity | 10 News+
description: Not paying a sex worker could now lead to rape charges in New South Wales after a landmark case reshaped how consent is interpreted under the law.  Questions are mounting over how Australia handled asylum claims involving members of Iran’s women’s national football team. After a group of players initially sought protection, several later reversed their decisions and returned home, sparking criticism and concern among advocates and political observers.  A new investigation claims to have uncovered hard evidence revealing the identity of the anonymous street artist known as Banksy. The report links the artist to a specific individual, but critics say the case may not be conclusive.  An Australian regional fuel distributor has pushed back against claims of price gouging after petrol prices surged following the war in the Middle East. title: Queensland On Cyclone Watch As Flood Clean Up Continues | 10 News
description: Queensland could be staring down the barrel of another cyclone, with a tropical low rapidly developing as it moves towards the coast. It comes as Bundaberg residents continue the clean-up following devastating inundation in the Wide Bay. The Far North is on water restrictions, while out west, locals are breathing a sigh of relief. title: Italy’s New Citizenship Laws Spark Outrage | 10 News
description: Italy is restricting who can obtain citizenship in a move that’s upsetting some expats.   Under the new rules, you can only claim citizenship if a parent or grandparent is born in Italy, and that relative must not be a dual citizen.
